topic: Premium comes from trust, not appearance alone
source_strategy: fresh Nano Banana portrait-trust cover plate + design-first compositor for the body slides
fallback_source: fallback to the April 8 v01 cover plate only if the v03 cover plate fails the text-safe-zone or trust-tone test
visual_intent: same brand system, cleaned-up production rhythm
brand_guardrails: Keep the carousel calm, premium, and medically responsible.
Do not use fake luxury styling or decorative random shapes.
Do not let the image overpower the message.
No English workflow labels or template residue.
Center content blocks optically inside cards, bands, and columns.
Use editorial Japanese line breaks, not forced wrapping.
composition: warm portrait-trust cover with protected left text zone
editorial body slides with stacked proof rhythm instead of the v01 three-column model
cover, reframe card, proof stack, reading rows, save close
reference_strategy: Use portrait-trust and editorial-whitespace anchors for the cover mood, then adapt Set C clarity into a softer stacked trust-proof body rhythm.
variation_guardrails: Do not reuse the v01 three-column model.
Do not drift into luxury-ad styling.
Keep the body calmer than the cover.
Make the alternative feel like a real design-behavior test, not a recolor.

text_overlay.headline_ja: プレミアムは、\n見た目だけでは\n決まりません。
slides_ja: 見た目は、きっかけにはなっても信頼そのものではありません。
信頼は、説明・基準・姿勢の積み重ねから生まれます。
ブランドを見るときは、見た目より中身の整い方を見る。
上質さは、見せ方より積み重ねです。

notes: April 8 cleaned-up production candidate. Keep the approved frontend copy locked, use the shared typography and compositor system, and pair the softer portrait-trust opener with a stacked proof-card body rhythm.
